Module com.example.escriturarapida
Package com.example.escriturarapida.controller

Class GameController

java.lang.Object
com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
All Implemented Interfaces:
AudioReceiver, javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class GameController extends Object implements javafx.fxml.Initializable, AudioReceiver
Main controller for the game screen. Coordinates UI events, the countdown timer, word validation, and background music. Delegates business logic to IGameModel and scene transitions to GameView. Implements AudioReceiver to receive the shared AudioManager instance from the previous scene without recreating the underlying MediaPlayer.
Since:
2026
Version:
1.0
Author:
Paulo Esteban OrdoÃ±ez GutiÃ©rrez

      • Constant Field Values

    • level

      private int level
      Current player level. Initialized from GameData if there is saved progress, otherwise starts at 1.

    • timer

      private javafx.animation.Timeline timer
      Main countdown timer for the current level.

    • seconds

      private int seconds
      Remaining seconds on the current timer.

    • milliseconds

      private int milliseconds
      Remaining milliseconds on the current timer.

    • audioManager

      private AudioManager audioManager
      Shared audio manager instance injected via setAudioManager(AudioManager). Controls background music state transitions throughout the game.

      public GameController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL url, ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
      Initialization method called automatically by JavaFX after the FXML is loaded. Configures visual glow effects, label styles, and starts the game.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable
      Parameters:
      url - URL of the loaded FXML (not used).
      resourceBundle - Internationalization resources (not used).

    • applyGlowEffect

      private void applyGlowEffect()
      Applies a purple glow effect to the word label.

    • applyLabelStyles

      private void applyLabelStyles()
      Sets the initial orange color style on timer and level labels.

    • screen

      private void screen()
      Displays the first random word on screen and updates the level label.

    • onValidation

      private void onValidation()
      Handles the validation button action from the FXML. Compares the typed word against the displayed word. On a correct answer, advances to the next level and restarts the timer. On an incorrect answer, displays a negative feedback message. When level 45 is reached, saves game data and transitions to the results screen.

      Music conditions are evaluated on every validation attempt via musicConditions().

    • startTimer

      private void startTimer()
      Starts or restarts the countdown timer for the current level. Available time decreases by 2 seconds every 5 levels. Timer color changes based on remaining time:
      • Orange by default.
      • Red when 10 or fewer seconds remain.
      • Alternating dark orange and dark red when 5 or fewer seconds remain.
      If time runs out, delegates to handleTimeOut().

    • updateTimerColor

      private void updateTimerColor()
      Updates the timer label color based on remaining seconds.

    • handleTimeOut

      private void handleTimeOut()
      Handles the case when the countdown reaches zero. Checks if the player typed the correct word just in time. Transitions to the results screen with the appropriate reason code:
      • 2 â€” Win by the skin of one's teeth (correct word entered at timeout).
      • 3 â€” Loss by timeout (incorrect or empty input).
      Music conditions are evaluated before the scene transition via musicConditions().

    • showMessage

      private void showMessage(boolean correct)
      Displays a popup feedback message for 1 second. The message and color differ based on whether the answer was correct or not.
      Parameters:
      correct - true if the word was correct, false otherwise.

    • setAudioManager

      public void setAudioManager(AudioManager audioManager)
      Receives the shared AudioManager instance from the previous scene. Sets the music state to AudioManager.GAME_START and triggers playback. Called automatically by GameView after the FXML is loaded, via the AudioReceiver interface.
      Specified by:
      setAudioManager in interface AudioReceiver
      Parameters:
      audioManager - the shared audio manager carrying the active MediaPlayer.

    • musicConditions

      public void musicConditions()
      Evaluates level-based conditions and updates the music state accordingly. Called on every word validation and on timeout to ensure music transitions are synchronized with game progression:
      • Level 14 â€” transitions to AudioManager.GAME_START_2.
      • Level 18 â€” transitions to AudioManager.GAME_MIDDLE.
      • Level 33 â€” transitions to AudioManager.GAME_FINAL.
